uplink.description: 0xF1 GNSS fix frame, northern/eastern hemisphere fix with paws/battery/working
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; lat/lon chosen in range (Berlin-ish), expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js field math.

uplink.description: 0xF1 GNSS fix frame, southern/western hemisphere fix (signed wraparound)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds negative-coordinate frame; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js sign-bit/wraparound math.
Synthetic; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (0xF0 carries no position).

uplink.description: 0xF2 no-fix frame, paws at alternate offset
uplink._note: Synthetic; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (0xF2 carries no position, paws at byte 35).
Synthetic error vector: leading byte is not 0xF0/0xF1/0xF2.
Synthetic error vector: 0xF1 frame too short to extract the GNSS fix.
